whatWasImplemented: src/app/api/widget/config/route.ts — public GET pre-flight. Answers 400 on missing site_key, 404 when site not found, 402 when owner subscription inactive, 503 when crawl_status !== 'ready', 200 { ready: true } otherwise. No rate-limit charge and no OpenAI calls — kept intentionally cheap.

widget/src/preflight.ts — pure helper preflightWidgetConfig({fetchFn, apiBase, siteKey, timeoutMs}) -> { status: 'ready' | 'silent' | 'degraded' }. Maps 200 → ready; 402/404 → silent (hide without logging, never surfaces billing to visitors); 5xx / network / AbortError → degraded. Uses AbortController + clearTimeout.

widget/src/loader.ts — rewrote pre-flight path. Replaces the old `__healthcheck__` POST with a pure preflightWidgetConfig call. Mounts the bubble only on 'ready'. On 'degraded' logs once (degradedWarned guard) and schedules a 60s retry. On 'silent' schedules a 60s retry without logging so the bubble reappears if the owner re-activates.

src/__tests__/widget-preflight.test.ts — 7 tests covering: 200 ready, 402 silent (VAL-DEGRADE-003), 5xx degraded (VAL-DEGRADE-001), network error degraded, AbortError degraded, 404 silent, AbortController signal propagation + timeout abort.
src/__tests__/widget-config-route.test.ts — 5 tests: missing site_key → 400, unknown key → 404, inactive subscription → 402, crawl not ready → 503, happy path → 200 ready:true.
whatWasLeftUndone: Playwright e2e against a live widget page with page.route toggling the endpoint between 500 and 200 (per the feature spec's verification step). VAL-DEGRADE-002 (bubble appears after recovery) is unit-tested at the pure-helper boundary but not yet verified with a real browser cycling the route mock. Follows the M5-M7 deferral pattern.
Widget bundle rebuild (pnpm build:widget) to actually ship the new loader JS into public/. Brandon rebuilds before deploy.
discoveredIssues: The previous loader's `__healthcheck__` POST burned a quota-RPC row per page load. The new GET endpoint is read-only and costs ~1 sites SELECT + 1 profiles/plans lookup via checkSubscription. Net improvement: every visiting tab no longer taps the message-counter RPC.

Both 402 and 404 are classified as 'silent' — we don't want to warn visitors about billing status OR about a key typo that the site owner made. The console stays clean and the widget just doesn't show. The loader will keep polling in case the owner fixes it without requiring a page reload.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 629 passing / 1 skipped / 76 files (+12 widget tests). Typecheck and lint clean.

filesChanged: widget/src/loader.ts (rewrote pre-flight + polling + bubble mount guard)
